name: Nutty Ice Cream Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in an ungreased 10 x 15 inch jellyroll pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned, stirring once halfway through baking.
5. Allow to cool in the pan before storing in an airtight container.
6. Serve over ice cream and top with purchased or homemade sauce.
